title: mikania ferruginea
intro: Mikania ferruginea, also known as the rusty cloud-fern or rusty glade fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Mikania ferruginea include relief from fever, colds, and respiratory problems, as well as its use in treating wounds and skin infections. Mikania ferruginea is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infused in oil to be used topically, with the tea being used to treat a variety of health issues and the infused oil being used to promote wound healing.
